title: V15 Learning Loop Protocol Enforcement Schema
description: Machine-enforceable companion schema for the V15 Learning Loop Protocol (The Dual Runner Launch). Extends V14 with: internal phase improvement cycles in all 9 phases, Swarm Mind One (JTBD Orphan Hunter) at end of every phase, Swarm Mind Two (Pure Innovation Swarm) at end of every phase, dual runner architecture (Innovation Runner on hurdles track, Memory Runner on straight track), and updated V20 stop condition requiring both runners to finish. Parent schema: /schemas/learning-loop-v14.schema.json. All loop execution outputs must validate against this schema. Failure to validate = REJECTED.

schema_version.description: Must match the current Learning Loop schema version. V15 introduces schema_version 2.0.

parent_loop_version.description: The version of the protocol this loop was run ON (e.g., 14.0).

journey_version.description: The current version milestone on the V13.1 to V20 journey.

memory_loss_probability.description: Calculated probability of memory loss for this run. Range 0.0 (impossible) to 1.0 (certain). Memory Runner's straight-track finish line is crossed when this reaches < 0.01.

runner_one_status.description: Status of the Innovation Runner (hurdles track). Clears 9 hurdles — one per phase — before finishing.

all_phases_at_threshold.description: True only when all 9 phases have cleared the Primal threshold (95%) or diminishing returns ceiling.

phases_completed.description: Number of hurdles cleared. Each phase cleared = one hurdle down.

phases_remaining.description: Number of hurdles remaining before the Innovation Runner crosses his finish line.

support_staff_reassigned.description: True when the Innovation Runner finishes all 9 hurdles and his swarm crew pivots to the Memory Runner's lane.

runner_two_status.description: Status of the Memory Runner (straight track). One lane, one finish line: memory loss probability < 0.01.

memory_threshold_crossed.description: True when memory_loss_probability has dropped below 0.01. The Memory Runner has crossed her finish line.

current_memory_loss_probability.description: The current calculated memory loss probability for this run.

support_staff_reassigned.description: True when the Memory Runner finishes and turns around to become the Innovation Runner's support crew.

phase_0_orient.description: Phase 0 ORIENT — must be completed before any other phase. Inherited from V14 with V15 additions: phase_improvement_cycle, swarm_mind_one, swarm_mind_two.

north_star_declared.description: North Star MUST be declared before any other work begins.

north_star_statement.description: The specific North Star for this loop. Must be explicit.

ruby_red_applicable.description: True ONLY if this loop is explicitly a Ruby Red initiative. Ruby Red is a LOCAL North Star, not universal.

schemas_loaded.description: All companion JSON schemas loaded and validated before proceeding.

schemas_validated.description: If any schema cannot be loaded, the loop must HALT and report to Master Jeeves.

source_citations.description: V14 ENFORCEMENT: Every factual claim MUST cite a vault_path or context_record_id. No citation = REJECTED.

markdown_prohibited.description: V14 ENFORCEMENT: No Markdown narrative in any field. All text is structured JSON strings.

no_paraphrase_rule.description: V14 ENFORCEMENT: AI cannot summarize past decisions. Must quote exact record IDs.

memory_anchor.description: V14 ENFORCEMENT: Every phase output must be anchored to a specific GitHub commit.

phase_improvement_cycle.description: V15 ADDITION: Internal recursive improvement cycle. Phase cannot advance until it hits Primal threshold (95%) or diminishing returns ceiling (less than 1% gain). This is the Innovation Runner's hurdle mechanism.

exit_condition.description: PRIMAL_THRESHOLD = phase scored >= 95. DIMINISHING_RETURNS = further improvement would yield less than 1% gain.

swarm_mind_one.description: V15 ADDITION: JTBD Orphan Hunter — runs at end of every phase. Looks outside the sector entirely. Asks what job this phase is trying to do, and who else in the world has already solved it. Brings orphaned solutions back.

north_star_read.description: Swarm Mind One MUST read the declared North Star before executing.

job_to_be_done_statement.description: The specific job this phase is trying to do, stated clearly before the hunt begins.

domains_scanned.description: External domains scanned for orphaned solutions (e.g., medicine, aviation, law, science, intelligence).

orphaned_solutions_found.description: Total number of orphaned solutions identified across all domains scanned.

swarm_mind_two.description: V15 ADDITION: Pure Innovation Swarm — outer edges of what is known or imagined. Does not look for existing solutions. Looks for what does not exist yet. What would be possible with no constraints? What has never been tried? What seems absurd but might be the breakthrough?

innovation_vectors_explored.description: Number of distinct innovation vectors explored by the swarm.

ideas_adopted.description: Number of frontier ideas adopted into the phase output.

phase_1_scout.description: Phase 1 SCOUT — research + mandatory Move 37 Orphaned Solutions Subroutine. Inherited from V14 with V15 additions: phase_improvement_cycle, swarm_mind_one, swarm_mind_two.

move_37_subroutine.description: MANDATORY: Move 37 Orphaned Solutions Subroutine. Must read Phase 0 North Star first.

phase_2_map.description: Phase 2 MAP — identify all gaps, conflicts, and improvement opportunities. Inherited from V14 with V15 additions: phase_improvement_cycle, swarm_mind_one, swarm_mind_two.

phase_3_hypothesize.description: Phase 3 HYPOTHESIZE — generate testable improvement hypotheses. Inherited from V14 with V15 additions: phase_improvement_cycle, swarm_mind_one, swarm_mind_two.

phase_4_experiment.description: Phase 4 EXPERIMENT — test highest-priority hypotheses. Inherited from V14 with V15 additions: phase_improvement_cycle, swarm_mind_one, swarm_mind_two.

phase_5_synthesize.description: Phase 5 SYNTHESIZE — combine improvements, run Spirit Check. Inherited from V14 with V15 additions: phase_improvement_cycle, swarm_mind_one, swarm_mind_two.

design_blueprint.description: Structured summary of the synthesized design for the next version.

phase_6_build.description: Phase 6 BUILD — write the improved artifacts. Inherited from V14 with V15 additions: phase_improvement_cycle, swarm_mind_one, swarm_mind_two.

phase_7_validate.description: Phase 7 VALIDATE — self-improvement loop with Diminishing Returns Stopping Rule. Inherited from V14 with V15 additions: phase_improvement_cycle, swarm_mind_one, swarm_mind_two.

phase_8_deploy.description: Phase 8 DEPLOY — commit JSON AND schema. Deployment is not complete until both are committed. Inherited from V14 with V15 additions: phase_improvement_cycle, swarm_mind_one, swarm_mind_two.

improvement_ledger_entries.description: All hypotheses logged to the Improvement Ledger during this loop.

performance_scoring.description: Final performance score for this loop's output. Innovation Runner's hurdle is cleared when score reaches >= 95 (PRIMAL_THRESHOLD) or diminishing returns ceiling.

recursive_improvement_log.description: Tracks each time the loop was run on itself. This is the recursive self-improvement history.

anti_drift_violations.description: Any time the AI used Markdown, summarized instead of citing, or hallucinated, it MUST be logged here. Memory Runner's straight-track finish line requires this array to be empty.

gift_to_strategy.description: What this loop leaves behind for the strategy it was run on. The ironclad memory gift.

gift_to_loop.description: What this loop leaves behind for the NEXT version of itself. The recursive self-improvement gift.

v20_stop_condition_met.description: V20 STOP CONDITION: Must be true ONLY when ALL of the following are satisfied: (1) runner_one_status.all_phases_at_threshold = true (Innovation Runner has cleared all 9 hurdles), (2) runner_two_status.memory_threshold_crossed = true (Memory Runner has crossed her straight-track finish line), (3) runner_two_status.current_memory_loss_probability < 0.01, (4) anti_drift_violations array is empty, (5) performance_scoring.score >= 100. Until all five conditions are met, the loop must continue evolving.

race_report_schema_path.description: Every V15+ run must file a Race Report validated against this schema.
